# kSecAttrEffectiveKeySize

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the effective number of bits in a cryptographic key.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrEffectiveKeySize: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber] and indicates the effective number of bits in this cryptographic key. For example, a DES key has a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrKeySizeInBits] of 64, but a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrEffectiveKeySize] of 56 bits.
title: kSecAttrEffectiveKeySize
